brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare Providers
One Platform for HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI Compliant Voice AI
Voice AI Co-Located with Telephony for Under 200ms Inference
Own Network Infrastructure Ensures Compliance and Speed
Trusted Voice AI with HIPAA-Ready Security Standards
Simplify Patient Communications with One Voice AI Platform
Global Voice AI with HIPAA and SOC 2 Type II Compliance
Voice AI Tailored for Healthcare with 99.999% Uptime
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI delivers HIPAA-compliant patient communication with sub-200ms latency through our own network infrastructure.
Ensure secure and compliant voice interactions with a platform covering 140+ countries and meeting HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards.
Leverage a single platform for healthcare voice AI that guarantees 99.999% uptime and co-located inference for minimal delay.
Our voice AI solution is built on an owned network, not resold, providing reliable, compliant communication for healthcare providers.
Telnyx Voice AI combines HIPAA readiness with SOC 2 Type II certification, enabling secure patient communication worldwide.
